top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to dip as Iran threatens US for ‘violating’ ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Global markets were able to take the new developments in the Middle East in their stride on Tuesday amid hopes a peace deal was on the horizon. The FTSE 100 ended the day in the green and despite some choppy trading oil prices eased. This [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chipmaker ETF rides AI excitement to quickest $10bn valuation on record
top_signals.summary: Roundhill Memory ETF, known as DRAM, surges 87% within 50 days of April launch
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: EU Chamber on Business Confidence in China
top_signals.summary: Jens Eskelund, President of the European Union Chamber of Commerce in China, tells Bloomberg’s The China Snow that the business group's latest survey shows an "inflection point" in confidence. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix, Micron Join $1 Trillion Market Cap Club | The Asia Trade 5/27/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 15m workers not ‘sufficiently’ saving for retirement, says top pensions chief
top_signals.summary: Tens of millions of working people will face a crisis in retirement with the current automatic salary contribution “no longer sufficient,” the boss of one of the UK’s largest pension providers has warned. Around 15 million people are set to suffer in retirement as workers use their automatic eight per cent auto-enrolment pension contribution as [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rice consumption in fiscal 2025 the lowest in seven years
top_signals.summary: The drop coincided with last summer's "Reiwa rice riots" when the staple disappeared from supermarket shelves and prices surged nationwide.

top_signals.title: New South Wales green lights $497M Copi critical minerals project
top_signals.summary: The mine will produce titanium minerals and rare earth elements including monazite and xenotime.
